---
title: "Confidence level and comparative analysis"
subtitle: "An R-driven workflow"
author: "Jacqueline Wu"
date: "2025-08-10"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

install.packages(c("readxl", "dplyr","tidyr", "ggplot2", "purrr", "stringr", "vegan"))  # Load required libraries, install if needed
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)
library(purrr)
library(vegan)
```

#### 1. Read in merged data
```{r}
paths <- c(
  Ellsworth = "D:/HuaweiMoveData/Users/jacqu/Desktop/Ellsworth86_513merged_results_with_filename.xlsx",
  Hoh = "D:/HuaweiMoveData/Users/jacqu/Desktop/HohPlot171_01merged_results_with_filename.xlsx",
  Clearwater = "D:/HuaweiMoveData/Users/jacqu/Desktop/Clearwater133_550merged_results_with_filename.xlsx"
)

df <- imap_dfr(paths, ~ read_excel(.x) %>% mutate(site = .y))
# Identify all abiotic terms and remove them
abiotic_terms <- c("Abiotic Rain","Abiotic Wind", "Abiotic Vehicle","Abiotic Aircraft", "Abiotic Logging")

df <- df %>%
  filter(!`Common name` %in% abiotic_terms)
```
#### 2. Adjust confidence level
```{r}
det_pct <- df %>%
  group_by(site) %>%
  summarise(
    total_rows = n(),
    non_na_rows = sum(!is.na(Confidence)),
    ge_0_15_rows = sum(Confidence >= 0.15, na.rm = TRUE),
    ge_0_20_rows = sum(Confidence >= 0.20, na.rm = TRUE),
    ge_0_30_rows = sum(Confidence >= 0.30, na.rm = TRUE),
    ge_0_40_rows = sum(Confidence >= 0.40, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_ge_0_15 = ge_0_15_rows / non_na_rows,
    pct_ge_0_20 = ge_0_20_rows / non_na_rows,
    pct_ge_0_30 = ge_0_30_rows / non_na_rows,
    pct_ge_0_40 = ge_0_40_rows / non_na_rows,
    .groups = "drop"
  )
print(det_pct)
```
#### 3. Read in result data
```{r}
paths <- c(
  Ellsworth  = "D:/HuaweiMoveData/Users/jacqu/Desktop/Ellsworth86_513summary_by_species.xlsx",
  Hoh        = "D:/HuaweiMoveData/Users/jacqu/Desktop/HohPlot171_01summary_by_species.xlsx",
  Clearwater = "D:/HuaweiMoveData/Users/jacqu/Desktop/Clearwater133_550summary_by_species.xlsx"
)

df_all <- imap_dfr(paths, ~ read_excel(.x) %>%
          mutate(site = .y, `Common name` = stringr::str_squish(`Common name`))
          ) %>%
          filter(!`Common name` %in% abiotic_terms)
```
#### 4.1 Comparative analysis - Identify shared and unique species
```{r}
# Check presence or absence
sp_pa <- df_all %>%
  distinct(site, `Common name`) %>%
  mutate(present = 1L) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = site,
    values_from = present,
    values_fill = 0
  )
# Define sets
all_three <- sp_pa %>% filter(Ellsworth==1, Hoh==1, Clearwater==1)
only_ellsworth  <- sp_pa %>% filter(Ellsworth==1, Hoh==0, Clearwater==0)
only_hoh  <- sp_pa %>% filter(Ellsworth==0, Hoh==1, Clearwater==0)
only_clearwater <- sp_pa %>% filter(Ellsworth==0, Hoh==0, Clearwater==1)

ell_hoh_only <- sp_pa %>% filter(Ellsworth==1, Hoh==1, Clearwater==0)
ell_cw_only <- sp_pa %>% filter(Ellsworth==1, Hoh==0, Clearwater==1)
hoh_cw_only <- sp_pa %>% filter(Ellsworth==0, Hoh==1, Clearwater==1)
# Summary counts
set_counts <- tibble(
  group = c("Shared by all three",
            "Ellsworth only","Hoh only","Clearwater only",
            "Ellsworth & Hoh","Ellsworth & Clearwater","Hoh & Clearwater"),
  n = c(nrow(all_three),
        nrow(only_ellsworth), nrow(only_hoh), nrow(only_clearwater),
        nrow(ell_hoh_only), nrow(ell_cw_only), nrow(hoh_cw_only))
)
```
#### 4.2 Comparative analysis - total species, total detections, Shannon
```{r}
df_all <- df_all %>% 
  mutate(total_det = days_detected * avg_detections_per_day)

site_summary <- df_all %>% 
  group_by(site) %>% 
  summarise(
    richness_total = n_distinct(`Common name`),
    total_detections_est = sum(total_det, na.rm = TRUE),
    shannon_by_detections = diversity(total_det, "shannon"),
    shannon_by_days = diversity(days_detected, "shannon")
  )
```
#### 5.1 Visualization
```{r}

```
